title: Derran Takkar
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Derran_Takkar.jpg]] |name=Derran Takkar |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Imperial Remnant]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Congratulations, you want what all of us wanted: the freedom to be who we want to be.|Luke Skywalker to Darran Takkar|[[Union 4|''Union'' 4]]}} '''Derran Takkar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], appointed to that position by [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] just before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. In the many years of retreat, however, he lost control of his [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. He organized a group of former Imperials to try and sabotage the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade|wedding]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and former [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|If I stopped you, you'd still be angry. If I let you stop yourself, a doorway to peace would open for you. You saw this as a travesty because, by marrying Mara, I was taking an important icon from you. But this is about starting a new life, not ending an old one. Come join with us, join the celebration.''"
"''You can't mean it.''"
"''I do. Let everyone see the rifts be healed.|Luke Skywalker and Derran Takkar|}} Derran Takkar was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]. Shortly after the signing of the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty]], Takkar was a refugee on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dolis 3]] with his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Anlys Takkar|Anlys]], and a small group of followers. Angered both personally and politically by the situation, he got into the palace in an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] uniform through the tunnels and threatened that he would send a virus to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] computer network through the use of a [[Deadman's switch/Legends|deadman's switch]]; however, he had a change of heart after Skywalker convinced him to stand down. [[File:Takkar_with_Virus.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Takkar at the wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade.]] After he had calmed down, Takkar observed that Skywalker could have simply kept the switch depressed with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] while Takkar was subdued. He was curious why Skywalker had instead chosen to reason with him. Takkar accepted his invitation to the wedding and defected to the New Republic. As it turned out, the virus he had threatened to use would not have worked anyways, since security measures against that specific danger had been in place for years. ==Appearances== *[[Union 1|''Union'' 1]] {{1st}} *[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] *[[Union 3|''Union'' 3]] *[[Union 4|''Union'' 4]] ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Derran Takkar }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Takkar, Derran}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Moffs of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:New Republic individuals]] [[Category:Personnel of the Imperial Remnant]]
